---
title: Doc Override Default
appendix-style: default
format: html
_quarto:
  tests:
    html:
      noErrors: true
      ensureHtmlElements:
        - ["div#quarto-appendix.default", "section#quarto-reuse"]
        - ["div#quarto-appendix.plain"]
---

This document overrides the project-level `appendix-style: plain` with
`appendix-style: default` in its frontmatter.
The appendix container should have class "default", not "plain".
